title: informed_by — INTERNAL provenance label set
description: Records which external references INFORMED an original authored decision. This is internal evidence/attribution ONLY. It must NEVER be exported to a public hover artifact, and it must NEVER carry copied external gloss text — only source LABELS and (optionally) a verification flag.

sources.description: labels only — no gloss text, no URLs to specific external glosses

quran_text_verified.description: the Qurʾān reference/text was checked (e.g. against Tanzil)

copied_text.description: MUST be false — copying external gloss text is forbidden

public_exposure.description: this object never appears in a public artifact

$comment: Boundary: external sources are uncopyrightable FACTS (root/POS/lemma) used as reference. Authored gloss text is original. The shipped public record is exactly {src:'qamus',kind:'authored',lang:'en'}.
